summary: Migrated Hub collector to consume Aitri Core's canonical ProjectSnapshot (aitri status --json, v0.1.77+). Snapshot-first dispatch with legacy reader fallback, structured failure logging, and ProjectCard sections (NEXT ACTION, DEPLOY HEALTH, staleness, blockers, last-session) backed by snapshot data.

files_modified.change: Added snapshot-first dispatch in collectOne: preflight version check (>=0.1.77), spawn aitri status --json via readSnapshot, project to legacy shape via projectFromSnapshot. On failure, fall back to demoted readers AND set degradationReason + appendStructuredLog. Inline readAitriRaw avoids invoking demoted readAitriState in version check / lastSession population.
Added appendStructuredLog(obj) — writes JSON-line to ~/.aitri-hub/logs/aitri-hub.log for machine-parseable snapshot-failure telemetry.

Added DegradationRow, NextActionRow, DeployHealthSection, StalenessIndicators components. Extended BlockersSection with normalize-warning row, PipelineSection with last-session line, QualitySection with verify/audit staleness. Render order: degradation → next action → deploy health → blockers → pipeline → quality → git → version.

Added severity tokens (--severity-warn #FDB022, --severity-critical #F97066, --severity-info #84CAFF) meeting WCAG 2.1 AA contrast on dark theme. Added classes: .severity-{warn,critical,info}, .next-action-row(+__badge), .deploy-health-row, .normalize-warning-row, .last-session-line, .degradation-warning-row, .next-action-skeleton. Mobile breakpoint at 480px.

files_created.purpose: Spawns aitri status --json with cwd=projectDir, shell=false, 1MiB stdout cap, setTimeout-based SIGKILL at timeoutMs (default 3000). Exports readSnapshot (with injectable spawnFn for tests), projectFromSnapshot (legacy-shape projection: aitriState/testSummary/bugsSummary/etc), formatRelativeTime (compact bucket boundaries: just now / Nm / Nh / Nd / absolute date), formatLastSessionLine (verbose 'N days ago' line for PIPELINE).

15 unit tests covering TC-010h (spawn args), TC-010f (spawn_failed), TC-010e1 (timeout SIGKILL), TC-011h (projectFromSnapshot equivalence), TC-016h (formatLastSessionLine verbose), TC-016e1 (formatRelativeTime bucket boundaries) + defensive normalization on partial snapshots.

3 integration tests using POSIX shell stub on PATH + AITRI_HUB_DIR temp dir: TC-017e1 (version_too_old skips snapshot entirely), TC-017e2 (snapshot failure writes structured JSON line to log), TC-011f (snapshot success path skips demoted readers, proven by bugsSummary populated without BUGS.json on disk).

test_results.notes: 18 new tests added (15 unit + 3 integration). Total Hub suite: 306 pass / 0 fail. NFR-006 (≤500ms p95 snapshot collection) and NFR-007 (≥400 LOC reduction in active path) not yet measured — both deferred to Phase 5 verification.

environment_variables: AITRI_HUB_DIR (existing, optional override of ~/.aitri-hub for testing)

technical_debt.substitution: Aitri Core snapshot v1 does not yet expose lastSession — worked around via inline readAitriRaw in collector/index.js that reads .aitri JSON for that single field. Remove once Aitri Core ships lastSession in snapshot.
Severity tokens (--severity-warn/critical/info) only verified for dark theme contrast (WCAG 2.1 AA). Light theme palette not added — light theme is not currently supported by the Hub UI.

TC-S002 skeleton row class (.next-action-skeleton) is rendered when nextActions is null, but App-level data-loading delay is not orchestrated — skeleton currently only appears on the brief render between collection cycles when snapshot fails and no fallback nextActions exist. A dedicated loading state at App.jsx is out of scope for this feature.

5 demoted readers (aitri-reader, requirements-reader, compliance-reader, test-reader, bugs-reader) intentionally retained on disk as the FR-017 fallback path. Deletion deferred to a follow-up feature once telemetry confirms snapshot success rate ≥99% (per NFR-007 scoping note).

Snapshot-failure structured log lines do not yet rotate — log file grows unbounded. Acceptable for current deployment scale; rotate via logrotate or implement size-based rotation in dashboard.js if hub.log exceeds 10MiB.
